svg.text: Roles fan out. Agents follow the work.
The framework defines 5 roles. The work is really ~14 processes — so the agents map to the processes, and each role's tasks spread across many of them.
ONE INBOX · MANY PROCESSES — THE TRIAGE ENABLES WHICHEVER AGENTS A MESSAGE TOUCHES
The JCT correspondence loop · single voice to the CA
One RFI register per project — log, number, route to CA
Flag programme impact → Delay & Claims Agent
Raise & price VO — cost + margin + prelims
Assemble QS Thu/Fri review · maintain VO register
<£1k PM issues; >£1k to CEO; then issue to CA
Convert delay events → NOD / EOT / L&E in JCT time bars
QS commercial build · issue to CA · close register
Lead final account; QS produces commercial build
Programme · procurement · supply chain · design & PC
Maintain logic-linked MS Project programme, weekly
Detect delay events → Delay & Claims Agent
Drive look-ahead, sub call-offs, material & RFI timing
Issue bid packages · build QS comparison register
Hard RAMS / insurance gate before any WO
Three-way handover: PM prog · QS £ · SM site
Valuation every cycle on every sub — no threshold
Three-signature payment: QS rec → CEO auth → FD pay
Close sub final account ≤60 days of PC
Review design info — errors, omissions, conflicts pre-site
Manage CDP submissions through the CA window
Manage PC (cl 2.21) · collate O&M / as-built / warranty pack
Human: PM makes the PC case
Monthly CVR per project — cost, value, accruals, FCC
FFA defended with workings · 13-wk rolling cashflow
Review contract terms — flag risk-shifting amendments
Daily diary — weather, labour, deliveries, photos
Convert VO-flagged site items → RFI / Variations / Delay
Cascade SM → PM → H&S → CEO; verbal now, written 24h
RIDDOR statutory branch on HSE deadlines
Track CDM / Construction Phase Plan & RAMS currency
ORCHESTRATION & GOVERNANCE — RUN ACROSS EVERY AGENT ABOVE
5-step chain: SM Site Report (Mon) → QS input (Wed) → PM Project
RAG status · RED-flag any missed report · monthly board summary
Live risk register · file & name to SharePoint convention
Human: each report has one named author
Log every CEO sign-off · notify FD within 24h
Hold threshold register (£1k VO / £5k sub) for June review
“Definition of done” live-file audit — AMBER if gaps found
Version control, distribution, acknowledgement, quarterly scorecards
THE POINT: ONE ROLE → MANY AGENTS
spreads across 9 agents — RFI, Variations, Delay, Valuations, Programme, Bid & Award, Technical & Handover, Site-item conversion, Cadence
spreads across 9 agents — RFI cost-flag, Variations review, Delay build, Valuations build, Bid comparison, Sub Commercial, CVR/FFA, Pre-con, Cadence
spreads across 5 agents — Site Diary & Quality, H&S Incident, Bid handover, Technical handover, Weekly Site Report
spreads across 3 agents — Sub payment gate, CVR/FFA recipient, Gate & Governance
1 agent — H&S Incident (its own time-critical path)
the human gate inside Variations, Delay, Bid, Sub payment, Cadence 1:1, Governance
